positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a forest scene viewed at twilight. The composition features a dense, intricate silhouette of tall, stylized pine trees and curved branches framing a central, luminous full moon. Subtle hints of glowing bioluminescent flora should appear at the base of the trees, giving off a gentle, ethereal blue and green glow. The overall style should be neo-tribal and whimsical, utilizing stark black silhouettes against a gradient pastel sky (deep indigo blending to soft lavender). The lines must be clean and bold, suitable for single-color screen printing or high-contrast screen printing. Central, balanced, and visually impactful. Intricate detailing, high contrast, graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, disfigured, realistic photo, oil painting, grainy, fuzzy, colored background gradient
